info.title: MCM API
info.description: Workspace ONE UEM MCM REST API

get.description: Search managed content for the specified parameters.

parameters.name: locationgroupcode
parameters.description: Organization group code.

parameters.name: locationgroupid
parameters.description: Organization group id.

parameters.name: queryString
parameters.description: Searches for the string value in the File Name.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Category.

parameters.name: mimeType
parameters.description: Filter contents by Mime Type.

parameters.name: expiresIn
parameters.description: Filter by Contents that are going to expire within days specified.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort the result based on a property. Accepts "Name", "Size", "Author", "DownloadPriority", "IsRequired", "IsActive", "EffectiveDate", "ExpirationDate", "ModifiedOn", or "ModifiedBy". By default it sorts by "Name"..

parameters.name: sortAscending
parameters.description: Sort direction. By default it sorts Ascending.

parameters.name: sortIndex
parameters.description: Start index of page.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Specifies the number of results returned per Page.

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3043: Please provide a valid Location Group Id or Code.} 2. {3032: You've sent invalid search criteria, look at the value of parameter '{0}'.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3047: You don't have permissions to access this Location Group.}

412.description: Precondition Failed 1. {3050: File is already under the category specified.} 2. {3053: Category not found or has subcategories, you can only add a file to a leaf category.} 3. {3051: Dates must be between 1/1/1753 12:00:00 AM and 12/31/9999 11:59:59 PM.}

post.description: Uploads a file to specified OG.

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: File name for the uploaded file.(Required)

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: The category for the file.(Required)

parameters.name: effectiveDate
parameters.description: The effective date for the file.(Required)

parameters.name: locationGroupId
parameters.description: The ID of the organization group.(Required)

parameters.name: locationGroupCode
parameters.description: The group code of the organization group.(Required)

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3009: Provide file name along with extension.} 2. {3046: Invalid category Id.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3001: You don't have permission to access this resource.} 2. {3006: This file type falls under restricted extension list.}

412.description: Precondition Failed. 1. {3058: Effective Date must be greater than or equal to today's date.} 2. {3063: You cannot upload an empty file.} 3. {3056: File size is larger than maximum allowed size.} 4. {3055: You have exceeded the storage limit for your Organization Group.} 5. {3061: Category has at least one Sub Category.} 6. {3057: Given combination of Category and File Name is not unique.}

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the file.(Required).

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3018: You have sent invalid file id.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3001: You don't have permission to access this resource.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {3027: File not found.}

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the file.(Required).

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3018: You have sent invalid file id.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3001: You don't have permission to access this resource.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {3027: File not found.}

get.summary: New - Get metadata for a Managed content.
get.description: Get metadata for the specified managed content.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the file.(Required).

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3018: You have sent invalid file id.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3001: You don't have permission to access this resource.} 2. {6001: The administrator has opted to use smart groups for assignments. Request you to use the ManagedContent V1 API}

404.description: Not Found 1. {3027: File not found.}

put.summary: New - Update metadata for a Managed content.
put.description: Update metadata for the specified managed content.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the file.(Required).

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The json for updating the content metadata.(Required).

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3018: You have sent invalid file id.} 2. {3075: Please provide valid User Groups under Assignment settings.} 3. {3076: Please provide valid Organization Groups under Assignment settings.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {3001: You don't have permission to access this resource.} 2. {6001: The administrator has opted to use smart groups for assignments. Request you to use the ManagedContent V1 API}

404.description: Not Found 1. {3027: File not found.}

412.description: Precondition Failed 1. {3050: File is already under the category specified.} 2. {3053: Category not found or has subcategories, you can only add a file to a leaf category.} 3. {3051: Dates must be between 1/1/1753 12:00:00 AM and 12/31/9999 11:59:59 PM.}

post.summary: New - Queues the deletion of multiple files
post.description: Queues the Deletion of multiple managed content files selected.

parameters.name: awContentIds
parameters.description: List of GUIDs of the managed content to be dleted(Required)

404.description: 1. {3027: No content records found to delete please check your input.}

get.description: It returns the count of content status like installed, uninstalled, assigned, viewed, and acknowledged.

parameters.name: contentUuid
parameters.description: Content Uuid.(Required)

403.description: 1. {3001: You don't have permission to access this resource.}

post.summary: Create new category under OG specified.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Category model.

404.description: NotFound 1. {3062: Parent category not found.}

412.description: PreconditionFailed 1. {3048: Category should not have Content and/or Subcategory. 2. {3045: Category with same name already exists}

post.summary: New - Creates a Content Gateway Configuration
post.description: It creates a content gateway configuration for the specific platform for which content gateway needs to be configured

parameters.name: ContentGatewayV1Model
parameters.description: Content gateway configuration details to be created(Required)

get.summary: New - Gets the content gateway configurations
get.description: It returns all the content gateway configurations such as the platform in which the content gateway is configured and the ports to which requests are to be forwarded.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Location group id for which content gateway configurations are needed(Required)

post.summary: New - gets the content gateway configurations and the certificate details
post.description: It returns a content gateway configuration such as the platform in which the content gateway is configured and the port to which requests are to be forwarded.

parameters.name: contentGatewayConfigurationUuid
parameters.description: Content gateway configuration uuid for which content gateway configurations are needed.(Required)

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: A JSON object containing certificate password.(Required)

delete.summary: New - Deletes a Content Gateway configuration.
delete.description: It deletes a content gateway configuration for the provided content gateway configuration uuid.

parameters.name: contentGatewayConfigurationUuid
parameters.description: Content gateway configuration uuid to be deleted.(Required)

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3002: Input contains invalid content gateway configurations uuid.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {3052: No content records found to delete please check your input.}

post.summary: New - Creates a Content Gateway Configuration
post.description: It creates a content gateway configuration for the specific platform for which content gateway needs to be configured

parameters.name: ContentGatewayV2Model
parameters.description: Content gateway configuration details to be created(Required)

post.summary: New - Gets the content gateway configurations and the certificate details with custom settings.
post.description: It returns content gateway configurations along with the custom settings.

parameters.name: contentGatewayConfigurationId
parameters.description: Content gateway configuration id for which content gateway configurations are needed(Required)

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: A JSON object containing certificate password.(Required)

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3073: Requested feature is not enabled at this organization.}

post.description: Deletes content gateway configuration in bulk for the provided configuration uuids.

parameters.name: contentGatewayConfigurationUuids
parameters.description: Content gateway configuration uuids to be deleted.(Required)

400.description: Bad Request 1. {3002: Input contains invalid content gateway configuration uuids.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {3052: No content records found to delete please check your input.}

get.summary: Returns Admin storage information of that OG.
get.description: Returns the admin storage information like content capacity.

PartialContentRange.description: Gets or sets partial content range.

FileName.description: Gets or sets FileName {Will be set in the content-disposition header}.

AcceptsByteRanges.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets a value which indicates whether a range byte request for a stream is accepted or not.

SendETagHeaderValue.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets the option to include ETagHeaderValue.

ResponseDateTimeFormat.description: Gets or sets dateTime format for response.

IRequestQuery.description:
Interface for IAwRequestQuery
This will hold all the required data for a request and will be filled from ModelBinder.

QueryParams.description: Gets or sets Query Parameters. For e.g. any query string parameters will be extracted to key,value pair and stored here.

TenantContext.description: Gets or sets IAwTenantContext. Will hold the tenant details, which will be filled as part of the tenant validation handler.

RequestMethod.description: Gets or sets RequestMethod. Will be used to write custom rules.

AllowedUriQueryChars.description: Gets or sets allowed Characters in Query String.

ITenantContext.description: Contract for TenantContext. Will be exposed from RequestQuery and will be injected to every controller actions and Business method.

TenantCode.description: Gets or sets TenantCode. Uniquely identify the tenant for the request.

OrganizationgroupId.description: Gets or sets Organization Group ID.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

contentId.description: The Unique Identifier for the File.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.
Gets or sets current objects UUID.

categoryId.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for category.

name.description: Gets or sets a user-friendly name for the category.

contentVersionId.description: Unique Identifier for the file version

size.description: The size in bytes of the content version.

hash.description: The computed hash for the content version.

sha256Hash.description: The computed Sha256 hash for the content version.

author.description: The author of the content version.

subject.description: The subject for the content version.

downloadLink.description: Download link for the content version.

hashAlgorithm.description: The algorithm used to compute the hash.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

allowViewOnline.description: Value indicates whether content is view online only.

forceEncryption.description: Value indicates whether forceEncryption is enabled.

allowOpenInEmail.description: Value indicates whether document opening in email is enabled.

allowOpenInThirdPartyApps.description: value indicates whether opening document in third party apps is enabled.

allowSavingToOtherRepositories.description: Value indicates whether saving to other repositories is enabled.

enableWaterMark.description: Value indicates whether watermark is enabled.

allowPrint.description: Value indicates whether printing the document is allowed.

allowEdit.description: Value indicates whether edit document is allowed.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

downloadWhileRoaming.description: Value indicates whether download while roaming is enabled.

forceDownload.description: Value indicates whether force download is enabled.

isRequired.description: Value indicates whether the content is required.

isFeaturedContent.description: Value indicates whether the content is featured.

userGroups.description: User group assignment for the content.

organizationGroups.description: organization group assignment for the content.

Title.description: Gets or sets title of the link.
